description: Position an element relative to another expression's location using anchor types (top, bottom, left, right) or table cell references (row, col).
utility: Position elements relative to another expression's location

arguments.name: expression
arguments.description: Reference to an existing expression (point, angle, line, edge, write, select, etc.)

arguments.name: anchorType
arguments.description: Anchor position on the referenced expression (used with arrows and markers)

arguments.name: tableRow
arguments.description: Row index when referencing a table cell

arguments.name: tableCol
arguments.description: Column index when referencing a table cell

alternates.description: Position label at a point with offset
Position label at an angle vertex
Position label at edge midpoint extracted from polygon
Arrow from bottom of one write to left of another

alternates.variant: Arrow from table cell to point
alternates.description: Arrow from table cell at row 1, col 2 to point P

alternates.variant: Arrow between table cell and point
alternates.description: Arrow from table cell to point with curvature and style
Callout annotation with arrow pointing right
Overbrace between two positions with label
Arrow from select position to write with curvature

examples.expression: label_1 = label(graph_1, at(item(triangle_1, type(edge), 2)), "a", buff(-2, -0.7), rotation(26), type(write))

examples.scenario: Label triangle edge with question mark
examples.expression: label_3 = label(graph_1, at(item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1)), "?", buff(0, 0.5), rotation(0))
label_5 = label(graph_1, at(item(triangle_1, type(edge), 3)), "x", buff(-0.2, -1.1), rotation(0))

examples.scenario: Arrow from table cell to a point on graph
Arrow from table cell to point with style

examples.expression: callout_1 = callout(at(3,5), at(3,8), at(5,8), at(5,5), type(right))

examples.scenario: Label Q on a graph point with offset
